title: util
description:
The util directory contains classes that are used by multiple other parts of the Hadoop system.
These classes include utility methods for configuration, logging, and other common tasks.
The classes in this directory are designed to be used as building blocks for other components of the system.
They are not intended to be used directly by end-users or developers.
The classes in this directory collaborate with each other to provide a set of common functionality that is shared across the system.
The architectural role of the util directory is to provide a set of reusable components that can be used by other parts of the system.
The pattern used in this directory is the utility pattern, which is a creational pattern that provides a set of static methods for creating objects.
